mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `character` ( name, appearance, background, personality, classic_lines, user_id,image, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, is_public ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{appearance}, #{background}, #{personality}, #{classicLines}, #{userId},#{image}, NOW(), NOW(), 0,0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE `character` SET image = #{imageUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{characterId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE `character`
name = #{name}, appearance = #{appearance}, background = #{background}, personality = #{personality}, classic_lines = #{classicLines}, update_time = NOW(),
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, image, appearance ,is_public FROM `character` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, image, is_public, background, personality, classic_lines,appearance FROM `character` WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, image, appearance, background, personality, classic_lines,appearance FROM `character` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_public = 1

SELECT id, name, image, appearance, background, personality, classic_lines,appearance FROM `character`
AND name LIKE concat('%', #{name}, '%')
AND personality LIKE concat('%', #{personality}, '%')
AND is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY create_time DESC
